summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Agricultural Water Bill Tracker MVP. All core features tested successfully including admin login, consumer management, bill generation with rate configuration, payment recording, and SMS functionality. Fixed critical backend ObjectId serialization issue and frontend DollarSign import error.
passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@waterbill.com / admin123)
Dashboard stats display (consumers, bills, amounts, paid, due)
Consumer management - create, read, update, delete operations
Consumer form validation and data persistence
Rate configuration - set rate per bigha and katha conversion ratio
Bill generation with automatic amount calculation
Bill creation form with consumer selection
Payment recording with bill selection and method options
Payment amount validation and due amount updates
SMS interface with consumer selection and templates
SMS template functionality (Payment Reminder, Payment Received, Bill Generated)
SMS sending (mocked - logs to console when Twilio not configured)
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Consumers, Bills, Payments, SMS)
Responsive UI elements and proper styling
